title: Zhengels's additions
description: This mod adds vanilla+ stuff and fixes some minecraft's flaws.
body:
### _use jei for more info and crafting recepies_
_also use polymorth to craft deepslate tools_



## Tools and armour


<details>
<summary>Stone tool variant</summary>

![Stone tool variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7d27d59edf137e212a7518f3f88ed591ecfbb35.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Copper</summary>
  
![Copper toolset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8df9e0715207ad33f47964627c0d55ce727461f0.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Amethyst</summary>

![Amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/948fecdcfc43356a02b783af0fccb3088ea83f4f.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Obsidian</summary>

![Obsidian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80bd19495927fd19bf11857e5ef2e0d74135303d.png)

First craft lava tool using iron tool and lava bucket, then jump in water to cool it.

</details>



<details>

 
<summary>Skythes</summary>

![Skythes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cc5d15b2beb0951ce4f9681731634f5dc7ad031.png)

RMB to harvest crops and replant them(if coresponding item is in inventory) in radius.
### enchantments
- Sweeping: increases harvest radius
- Nature's gift: grants xp on crop harvest

</details>


<details>
<summary>Hammers</summary>

![Hammers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/105d42ee4f8b0521e53197dbb06c746e4c713b49.png)

RMB to place blocks in a 3x3 plane around clicked block from your offhand.
### enchantments:
- Sweeping: increases building range(+1/level)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Knuckles</summary>

![Knuckles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6e23471dad1faf938c1a8ca58ad9bb09e07be40.png)

small damage with incredible attack speed.
### enchantments:
- rage: stacks strength on entity hit

</details>


<details>
<summary>Sword skins</summary>

![Sword skins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09f0f5e1ae9a0ea842a408e38f5de781ff7eec28.png)

Applied on iron, diamond or netherite tier swords using tool trim and coresponding material. No stat changes, it just looks cool!

</details>

## Random trinckets


<details>
<summary>Xp storing crystalls</summary>

![Xp storing crystalls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40c094dc261a5c69df80c8a82ab9f77c0340201a.png)

RMB to store xp/take it. 

</details>


<details>
<summary>Repair core</summary>

![Repair core](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/748bf0ab36029f7f19f09650281ab4e9b4bd4ea2.png)

Repairs items using charge(1/1). Charge it with these items:
- Diamond: 1200
- Lapis lazury: 20
- Golden ingot: 200
- Amethyst shard: 300
- Raw gold: 150
- Amethyst block: 20
  
</details>


<details>
<summary>Totems</summary>

![Totems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbc6698d1f08c76be0ed3713e868c41aacaef92c.png)

### Amethyst totem
Temu totem of undying. Heals if your hp is >25%, but cant save you from death.

### Obsidian totem
Gives fire resistance upon fire.

</details>

## Food

<details>
<summary>Food</summary>

(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/789f89a2670b3586f07fcc8128f81a96602c6631.png)

Dyable, got different flawors with different effects.

(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc62decbe093dd63881ce720b33c7bca7331e163.png)

lets you make cartoonish poof-like move.

![Chocolate apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcc62435f7465819531ea8e23c6f802730e02b5d.png)

A bit worse golden apple.

![Candy cane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea5ce326ae878d28fcdd6b1dedbfff77f5ffaef5.png)

Gives speed I.

![Soups](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/733b14ea1438bec6409b684a8e5efbaa89a11809.png)

- Beetroot with steak: gives strength
- Poisonous: poison & strength
- Sea pickle: gloving & water breathing
- Rotten: Russian roulette
- Vegetable: just a soup
  
![Teas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f35b55117e31408530bd8c7d3c8d5b8e6abcb53e.png)

Extinguish you.

![Sushi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5ab49cf38f1546421ca5012c848869d45a75554.png)

![Lasagna & apple pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96bd584b744f41d383a0fbfbf1decc4d4e48527a.png)

Lasagna instantly regenerates you, apple pie gives absorption.

</details>

Has gravity, can be dissolved and crystallised to make building blocks

## Items


<details>
<summary>XP crystalls</summary>

![XP crystalls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efb8e492a969e0aa603f7cce2c99368fa51de836.png)

Can be found in structures, break it to get fixed amount of xp.

</details>

## Mastery

<details>
<summary>Explonation</summary>

![Golden shred and the seal of mastery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/559cdb5203557b9ad37f804d5c7745511ae54777.png)

The Mastery System is a cornerstone of late-game progression, offering powerful, specializations for your gear. Unlike simple stat boosts, each Mastery radically changes how an item functions, creating unique tactical niches and playstyles.


Obtaining Masteries: The Mastery Crucible
Masteries are not crafted directly. You must first create Golden Shreds, then combine 9 of them into a random Mastery Seal. If you dont like mastery you got, you can tear it back into 6 golden shreds.

Golden Shred Creation:

Crafted at the Mastery Crucible.

Requires a layered ritual with three components (Outer Ring, Inner Ring, Core).

Multiple recipes exist.

Mastery Seal Crafting:

9x Golden Shred → 1x Golden Scroll at a crafting table.

Right-click the air with the Golden Scroll to transform it into a random Mastery Seal.

Applying a Mastery:

Right-click a tool, weapon, or armor piece with the Mastery Seal to apply it permanently.

Each item can have only one Mastery. It cannot be removed, only overwritten.

![Phantom wound mastery on sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b98ef0d0d9df686fdbfe238bcbc211febae111bf.png)

Catalog of Masteries:

Pickaxe:
- Veinminer: Instantly mines an entire connected vein of ore.
- Autosmelt: Automatically smelts eligible blocks.
- Tunelling: Mines a 2x1 tunnel.
- Drill: Gives 3s of haste, each block upgrades its umplifier with 25%.
- Blast lust: Explodes mined block. Explosion significantly damages armour.

Axe:
- Autosmelt: Automatically smelts eligible blocks.
- Drill: Gives 3s of haste, each block upgrades its umplifier with 25%.

Sword:
- Ricochet: Strikes chain between multiple entities. Damage decreases with each bounce.
- Phantom wound: Applies a debuff. If the target moves >15 blocks away before it expires, they take massive damage.

Shovel:
- Tunelling: Mines a 2x1 tunnel.
- Drill: Gives 3s of haste, each block upgrades its umplifier with 25%.
- Blast lust: Explodes mined block. Explosion significantly damages armour.

Armour:
- Negate: Completely negates damage from attacks whose base damage is below a threshold (scales with pieces worn).

Skythe:
- Super-yield: 25% chance for double yield from any harvested crop block.

</details>
